info.title: codeCurate
info.description:
# codeCurate API

codeCurate is a community-driven curation platform where users can discover, share, and review helpful YouTube videos and playlists. Think of it as a curated library of educational content where the community can write reviews, like helpful reviews, and engage in discussions through threaded replies.

## What You Can Do

**Authentication** – Sign up, sign in, sign out, verify your email, reset your password, and refresh your access token.

**User Profiles** – View, update, or delete your own profile.

**Resources** – Browse all YouTube videos and playlists, view individual resources, and find related content. Note: Only admins can add or remove resources. Regular users can browse and review them.

**Reviews** – Write reviews on resources, edit or delete your own reviews, like reviews from others, and participate in threaded reply conversations.

## Base URL

All API endpoints use: `localhost:8000/api/v1`

There's also a health check endpoint at `localhost:8000/health` to verify the server is running.

## Getting Started

1. Use the **signup** request to create a new account
    
2. Verify your email using the link sent to you
    
3. **Sign in** to get your access token
    
4. Start exploring YouTube videos and playlists, and share your reviews!

example.reviewText: I found this YouTube tutorial extremely helpful. The presenter breaks down complex concepts into clear, easy-to-follow steps and uses real-world examples that make the material practical and relatable.
This is was not that much good tutorial

example.replyText: thanks for your review for this video, it really helped me to learn Next js.
I disagree with this review. It's not accurate.
